user.title: Auto-discovery
user.description:
EverShelf was not found at `{tried}`.

Auto-discovery requires **avahi-daemon** (mDNS) to be installed and running on the EverShelf server. If it is not available, enter the URL manually.

retry_discovery.title: Still not found
retry_discovery.description:
EverShelf is still not reachable at `{tried}`.

Make sure **avahi-daemon** is active on the EverShelf host, or enter the URL manually.

manual.title: Connect to EverShelf
manual.description: Enter the URL of your EverShelf server. It must be reachable from your Home Assistant host.

data_description.url: The base URL of your EverShelf server, without trailing slash.

zeroconf_confirm.title: EverShelf found on your network!

auth.title: Authentication

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to EverShelf. Check the URL and make sure the server is reachable from Home Assistant.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid token. Check `API_TOKEN` in your EverShelf `.env` file.
error.token_required: This EverShelf server requires an API token. Enter `API_TOKEN` from `.env`.

abort.already_configured: This EverShelf instance is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach EverShelf. Please check network connectivity.

data_description.expiry_days: Products expiring within this many days are counted as 'expiring soon'. Default: 3.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll EverShelf for updates, in seconds. Default: 300 (5 min).

add_to_shopping.name: Add to Shopping List
add_to_shopping.description: Add a product to the EverShelf shopping list.

name.name: Product name
name.description: Name of the product to add.

unit.name: Unit
unit.description: Unit of measurement, e.g. pz, kg, l (optional).

mark_used.name: Mark as Used
mark_used.description: Reduce the stock of an inventory item.

quantity.name: Quantity used
quantity.description: Amount to subtract from current stock.

refresh.name: Refresh Data
refresh.description: Force an immediate refresh of all EverShelf sensor data.

suggest_recipe.name: Suggest Recipe
suggest_recipe.description: Ask EverShelf AI to suggest a recipe based on items expiring soonest.

location.name: Location
location.description: Optional pantry location to focus on (e.g. frigo, freezer). Leave empty for all.

refresh_prices.name: Refresh Prices
refresh_prices.description: Recompute shopping list estimated total from existing price cache.

clear_expired.name: Clear Expired
clear_expired.description: Remove expired zero-stock inventory rows from EverShelf.
